channel.title: 2 on Xu Du
channel.description: Recent content in 2 on Xu Du

item.title: Sequential Beamforming for Multiuser MIMO With Full-Duplex Training
item.description: Propose sequential beamforming which utilizes full-duplex AP to reduce MIMO CSI training overhead for half-duplex clients.

item.title: Hybrid photonic-plasmonic molecule based on metal/Si disks
item.description: Undergraduate work on photonic-electronic device design.
